record.field: Mattermost is an open-source, self-hosted collaboration platform that brings secure team messaging, workflow automation, and DevOps tooling under your own control.

Mattermost is an open-source, self-hosted collaboration platform that brings secure team messaging, workflow automation, and DevOps tooling under your own control.

Built as a privacy-focused alternative to Slack and Microsoft Teams, Mattermost combines persistent channels, direct messaging, file sharing, voice and screen sharing with structured automation through Playbooks and task Boards. It runs as a single Go binary backed by PostgreSQL, integrates with existing identity and DevOps tooling, and is favored by enterprises, regulated industries, and government agencies that require data sovereignty and compliance.

Key features
  • Persistent channels, threaded conversations, and direct/group messaging
  • Playbooks for incident response and repeatable workflow automation
  • Boards for kanban-style task and project management
  • Voice calls, screen sharing, and file sharing across teams
  • Native desktop and mobile clients plus an extensive plugin and integration ecosystem
  • Enterprise-grade SSO (SAML, OAuth, LDAP/AD), compliance exports, and granular access control
Best for

Engineering, DevOps, and security teams—and organizations in regulated or sovereignty-sensitive sectors—that need a fully self-hosted, auditable chat and collaboration hub instead of a SaaS messaging tool.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_communication'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_chat'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_collaboration'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_productivity'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_project_management'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_security'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_privacy')])]

record.field: services: postgres: image: postgres:17 restart: unless-stopped security_opt: - no-new-privileges:true pids_limit: 100 read_only: true tmpfs: - /tmp - /var/run/postgresql volumes: - ./mattermostdbdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data environment: - TZ - POSTGRES_USER - POSTGRES_PASSWORD - POSTGRES_DB container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_postgres' networks: - internal mattermost: depends_on: - postgres image: mattermost/mattermost-team-edition:10.6.1 restart: unless-stopped security_opt: - no-new-privileges:true pids_limit: 200 read_only: false tmpfs: - /tmp volumes: - ./mattermostconf:/mattermost/config - ./mattermostdata:/mattermost/data - ./mattermostlogs:/mattermost/logs - ./mattermostplugsin:/mattermost/plugins - ./mattermostclientplugins:/mattermost/client/plugins - ./mattermostbleveindexes:/mattermost/bleve-indexes environment: - DOMAIN - TZ - POSTGRES_USER - POSTGRES_PASSWORD - POSTGRES_DB - MM_SQLSETTINGS_DRIVERNAME - MM_SQLSETTINGS_DATASOURCE - MM_BLEVESETTINGS_INDEXDIR - MM_SERVICESETTINGS_SITEURL - APP_PORT container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:8065' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Dump consistente de PostgreSQL (servicio en marcha) → $BACKUP_DATA_DIR docker compose exec -T postgres sh -c 'pg_dump -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" --no-owner -Fc' \ > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.dump" echo "pg_dump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.dump") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Levanta solo la DB, espera readiness y restaura docker compose up -d postgres for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose exec -T postgres sh -c 'pg_isready -U "$POSTGRES_USER"' && break sleep 2 done docker compose exec -T postgres sh -c 'pg_restore -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" --clean --if-exists --no-owner' \ < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.dump" # Verificación: la DB no quedó vacía (sh -c con dobles comillas; $VAR del contenedor con \$) N=$(docker compose exec -T postgres sh -c "psql -U \$POSTGRES_USER -d \$POSTGRES_DB -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public'\"") echo "tablas restauradas: $N" test "$N" -gt 0
